data.title: Founder of WallStreetBets joins Own. App as advisor to build creator-led platform, aiming to give creators ownership and control.
data.description: A partnership has been announced between Own. App, a social media platform focused on creator content ownership and monetization, and Jaime Rogozinski, the founder of WallStreetBets. Rogozinski will be joining Own. App as a strategic advisor to assist in the platform's expansion. The collaboration aims to establish a creator-owned media ecosystem within Own. App. This initiative is set to launch in beta to the public in July. The integration with WallStreetBets community will allow creators to have direct control over their content and communities, breaking away from the traditional social media platforms that usually retain ownership rights. Rogozinski expressed his enthusiasm for the partnership, stating that Own. App is designed to provide creators with genuine ownership of their work. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Nano Labs Ltd. has acquired $50 million worth of 74,315 Binance Coin tokens at an average price of $672.45 each, increasing their reserves to around $160 million for strategic purposes.
data.description: Nano Labs Ltd. (NASDAQ: NA) has officially acquired 74,315 Binance Coin (CRYPTO: BNB) tokens for a total of $50 million. This purchase has boosted the company's digital currency reserves to around $160 million, marking a significant increase as part of their overall strategic accumulation strategy. The transaction was conducted through over-the-counter (OTC) channels at an average price of $672.45 per token. This move highlights Nano Labs' strong commitment to expanding its exposure to Binance Coin. The company specializes in developing high-throughput and high-performance computing solutions, including their proprietary "Cuckoo" technology. This news can be found in its entirety on Benzinga.com.
